tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.context: Cited as widely known conversational interface powered by LLMs.

papers.title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
papers.context: Foundational paper for the ReAct (reason + action) pattern discussed as core of agentic LLMs.

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.context: Referenced when explaining giving models time to think via CoT prompting.

papers.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
papers.context: Foundational RAG paper referenced when covering retrieval augmented generation to reduce hallucination.

papers.title: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback
papers.context: Referenced when discussing instruction tuning and RLHF during post-training.

people.name: Petra Wolf
people.context: Moderates the Q&A session with the speaker.

concepts.name: Large Language Model
concepts.context: Core subject: probabilistic next-token predictor trained on large corpora.

concepts.name: Pre-training
concepts.context: First stage of LLM training on large text corpora.

concepts.name: Prompt Engineering
concepts.context: Best practices for preparing model inputs.

concepts.name: Few-Shot Learning
concepts.context: Providing example input/output pairs in the prompt.

concepts.name: Chain-of-Thought Prompting
concepts.context: Giving the model time to think through steps.

concepts.name: Hallucination
concepts.context: Key limitation of LLMs generating incorrect information.

concepts.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
concepts.context: Indexing text into embeddings and retrieving top-k chunks for grounded answers.

concepts.name: Vector Database
concepts.context: Storage for embeddings used in nearest-neighbor retrieval.

concepts.name: Word Embedding
concepts.context: Embedding space used to represent text chunks.

concepts.name: Function Calling
concepts.context: Tool usage via model-generated API calls.

concepts.name: ReAct
concepts.context: Reasoning + action pattern central to agentic LLMs.

concepts.name: LLM-as-a-Judge
concepts.context: Method of using an LLM to evaluate model-generated outputs.

concepts.name: Multi-Agent System
concepts.context: Design pattern splitting tasks across specialized agents.

concepts.name: AI Agent
concepts.context: Agentic language model interacting with an environment.

concepts.name: Fine-Tuning
concepts.context: Further training of LLMs on task-specific data.

reason.pt: Cobre a progressão do prompting para sistemas agênticos, mesmo arco conceitual.
reason.en: Covers progression from prompting to agentic systems, same conceptual arc.

reason.pt: Compartilha o foco em contexto, guardrails e avaliação no design de LLMs agênticos.
reason.en: Shares focus on context, guardrails and evaluation in agentic LLM design.

reason.pt: Discute padrões de design de fluxos agênticos semelhantes a planejamento/reflexão/uso de ferramentas aqui.
reason.en: Discusses agentic workflow design patterns similar to planning/reflection/tool-use here.

reason.pt: Perspectiva complementar sobre padrões de design de agentes e alternativas.
reason.en: Complementary perspective on agent design patterns and alternatives.

reason.pt: Práticas de engenharia (tracing, evals) para agentes de código combinam com as recomendações da palestra.
reason.en: Engineering practices (tracing, evals) for coding agents match talk's recommendations.

reason.pt: Roteiro de entrada alinhado com o conselho 'comece simples, itere' dado na palestra.
reason.en: Entry-level roadmap aligns with the 'start simple, iterate' advice given.

reason.pt: Também é uma sessão da Stanford Online oferecendo orientação fundamental sobre IA.
reason.en: Also a Stanford Online session providing foundational AI guidance.
